overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character with a glowing cybernetic arm smoking on a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night, who then breaks into a run through the industrial urban environment. The scene features wet pavement reflections, stacked industrial crates, and graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban sidewalk with industrial storage crates

agents.ego_description: leaning against a metal railing, smoking a cigarette and examining her glowing cybernetic arm

entered.detail: black metal barrier railing along the sidewalk edge
large red and brown industrial crates stacked behind the railing
illuminated digital advertisement screen glowing purple and blue
tall concrete industrial structure with small windows
black garbage bags piled on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary leaning against a metal railing on a rain-soaked sidewalk, surrounded by stacked industrial crates and neon-lit buildings. She smokes a cigarette while examining her cybernetic arm in the neon-lit night.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban sidewalk with industrial storage crates

events.description: pedestrian in yellow reflective vest walks past in the background
character pushes off the railing and stands up straight, preparing to move

agents.ego_description: finishing her cigarette, looking around the street, then rising from the railing to prepare for movement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a yellow reflective vest walking past behind the main character

segments.scene_description: The character remains near the railing as a pedestrian walks past in the background. She finishes smoking, looks around the neon-lit street, then pushes off the railing to stand upright, transitioning from passive observation to readiness.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wet urban alley with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: character breaks into a sprint down the wet street
dark sedan drives past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: sprinting down the wet pavement through the neon-lit urban canyon, passing graffiti walls and industrial structures

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving away down the wet street, passing the running character

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in white and blue graffiti art depicting abstract figures
large black cylindrical industrial ventilation structure
tall lamp posts casting orange light onto the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character accelerates into a full sprint down the narrow wet street, leaving the railing and crates behind. She runs past graffiti-covered walls and industrial ventilation pipes as a car passes by on the left, navigating through the neon-lit urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a moment of static contemplation into a high-speed sprint through a neon-lit industrial district. It begins with the character leaning against a metal railing on a rain-soaked sidewalk, smoking a cigarette while examining her glowing cybernetic arm amidst stacked crates and towering buildings. As a pedestrian passes in the background, she finishes her cigarette and pushes off the railing, shifting from a state of passive observation to sudden readiness. The scene then accelerates as she breaks into a full sprint down the narrow wet street, leaving the stationary crates behind. Finally, the camera tracks her movement past graffiti-covered walls and industrial ventilation pipes as a car streaks by, plunging deeper into the glowing urban canyon.
